name: NORTHERN TECHNOLOGIES INTERNATIONAL CORP
summary: Northern Technologies International Corporation (NTIC) develops and markets proprietary, environmentally beneficial corrosion prevention products and services under the ZERUST brand, and bio-based compostable polymer products under the Natur-Tec brand. Operating in over 65 countries via subsidiaries, joint ventures, distributors, and agents, NTIC serves automotive, industrial, mining, agricultural, retail, and oil and gas markets. ZERUST products include packaging, liquids, coatings, rust removers, and engineered solutions. Natur-Tec products include compostable resins and finished goods like bags, cutlery, and foodservice items.

products.name: ZERUST Plastic and Paper Packaging
products.description: Corrosion-inhibiting packaging that releases a non-toxic vapor forming a passivating layer on metal surfaces.

products.name: ZERUST Liquids, Coatings, and Cleaners
products.description: Chemical rust prevention solutions including powders, liquids, coatings, rust removers, cleaners, and diffusers.

products.name: ZERUST Engineered Solutions for Oil and Gas
products.description: Corrosion prevention solutions and technical consulting designed specifically for oil and gas infrastructure.

products.name: Natur-Tec Biopolymer Resin Compounds
products.description: Patented bio-based, certified compostable polymer resins for blown-film extrusion, injection molding, thermoforming, and other applications.

products.name: Natur-Tec Finished Products
products.description: Compostable finished goods including can liners, shopping bags, cutlery, drinking straws, food-handling gloves, and coated paper products.

products.name: ZERUST Corrosion Management Consulting
products.description: Worldwide on-site technical consulting services for rust and corrosion prevention issues.

partnerships.partner_name: EXCOR KORROSIONSSCHUTZ TECHNOLOGIEN UND PRODUKTE GMBH
partnerships.description: 50% owned joint venture in Germany selling rust and corrosion inhibiting products.
50% owned joint venture in Japan selling rust and corrosion inhibiting products.
50% owned joint venture in the United States selling rust and corrosion inhibiting products.
50% owned joint venture in France selling rust and corrosion inhibiting products.
30% indirectly owned joint venture in South Korea selling rust and corrosion inhibiting products.
